room.caption: [Vault20] My favorite boss fights from DT1 are the 'Shroud Lord' and 'Demon Cursor'. Slaix actually came up with most of the ideas for the Demon Cursor.

instance.creationCode: moveSpeedX=1 moveSpeedY=0 bMoving=0 drawType=1 platColor=make_color_rgb(170,170,255) sprite_index=sScaledCollision image_xscale=128 image_yscale=16
zoneColor=3 image_xscale=80; image_yscale=80 moveSpd=1; moveDelay=48 direction=270
zoneColor=4 image_xscale=80; image_yscale=80 moveSpd=1; moveDelay=48 direction=90
zoneColor=1 image_xscale=80; image_yscale=80 moveSpd=1; moveDelay=48 direction=270
